data.name: Alchemy Passage
data.detailed_description:
■故事

煉金術士「Ruby」來到漂浮者面前，請你幫忙。當你和她一起冒險時，你們的關係會加深，成為戀人，並發生性關係。在追尋「偉大的魔法石」的過程中，她和你的命運都將開始改變。

-------------------------------------------------

※本遊戲僅提供日文版本。

■遊戲規格等

- 循環聲音/高潮聲音/戰鬥聲音均為專門為該遊戲以日語錄製！

- 事件 H：24 個場景

- 輕鬆H：40個場景

*此功能可讓您在冒險過程中一鍵立即播放射精場景

★活動H、簡易H全部H場景均為獨家CG！

- 預計遊戲時間：約8至12小時

■系統功能

- 使用煉金術合成材料並製造物品！

- 使用煉金術從怪物核心中創造出各種魔像並一起戰鬥！

- 享受不同難度設定的簡單遊戲，或享受艱難的 Boss 戰！

- 對於那些覺得更無聊的人，有一個完整的回憶解鎖功能！ （您也可以撤銷完全解鎖）

- 沒有場景分支、END分支、限時事件等煩人的元素！

data.short_description: 回合製角色扮演遊戲。煉金術士「Ruby」來到漂浮者面前，請你幫忙。當你和她一起冒險時，你們的關係會加深，成為戀人，並發生性關係。在追尋「偉大的魔法石」的過程中，她和你的命運都將開始改變。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Alchemy Passage
data.detailed_description:
■Story

The alchemist "Ruby" comes to you, a floater, to ask for a favor. As you adventure with her, you will deepen your relationship, become lovers, and have sex. The destiny of both her and you will begin to change in the pursuit of the "Great Philosopher's Stone."

-------------------------------------------------

※This game is only available in Japanese.

■Game specifications, etc.

- Loop voices/climax voices/battle voices are all recorded in Japanese specifically for this game!

- Event H: 24 scenes

- Easy H: 40 scenes

　*This function allows you to instantly play ejaculation scenes with one touch during your adventure

★All H scenes in Event H and Easy H are exclusive CG!

- Estimated play time: Approximately 8 to 12 hours

■System functions

- Use alchemy to synthesize materials and create items!

- Create various golems from monster cores using alchemy and fight together!

- Enjoy easy gameplay with different difficulty settings, or enjoy hard boss battles!

- For those who find it even more tedious, there is a full recollection unlock function! (You can also undo full unlocks)

- There are no annoying elements such as scenario branching, END branching, or time-limited events!

data.short_description: turn-based RPG game. The alchemist "Ruby" comes to you, a floater, to ask for a favor. As you adventure with her, you will deepen your relationship, become lovers, and have sex. The destiny of both her and you will begin to change in the pursuit of the "Great Philosopher's Stone."

Minimum:
  • OS: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 11
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
